name: Philippines
contextBlurb: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) regulates virtual asset service providers (VASPs) under Circular No. 1108. The Philippines has a relatively open stance toward crypto, with several peso-backed stablecoins in circulation. Stablecoin issuers must register as VASPs and comply with AML/CFT requirements. A comprehensive licensing framework for stablecoin issuance is still in development.

stablecoinMeta.summaryEn: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) regulates virtual asset service providers (VASPs) under Circular No. 1108. The Philippines has a relatively open stance toward crypto, with several peso-backed stablecoins in circulation. Stablecoin issuers must register as VASPs and comply with AML/CFT requirements.

regulators.name: Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas
regulators.role: Central bank and primary regulator for virtual asset service providers (VASPs). Issues VASP licenses and sets AML/CFT requirements for crypto and stablecoin operators.
